prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-FARMPLAYSET-GRN Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Farm Trucks Pretend Play Set Creativity DIY Tools Boys Ages 3 and Up Description: Is your child obsessed with farming toys and trucks? Then this fun Farm Trucks Create and Play toy set from Kidplokio is a perfect gift idea for your little one. The pretend play set comes with everything your kid will need to take care of their very own farming equipment: a truck, a livestock trailer with a cow, and tools to practice replacing the truck parts.

DIY pretend play tool sets like these are wonderful toys for encouraging kids to practice their fine motor skills and coordination. The tools included will allow your child to tinker with the farm truck parts and learn about how trucks work, preparing them for dealing with real cars and trucks when they are older.

These types of playsets are also great for parents who want to spend more time playing with their children in an interactive way. You can teach them about the importance of taking care of tools and equipment while encouraging fun and creative playtime, with an emphasis on imagination.

All of the parts included in this playset are made of durable, high-quality plastic that is safe for children ages 3 and up, with parental supervision. They come inside of a sturdy plastic storage box with a snap-tight lid and top handle for easy clean-up after playtime, and you can teach your kid how to put away their toys and organize them until next time. This is a must-have gift set for your little one who loves pretend play farming. Search Terms: farm toys farm animal toys farm animals toys for kids 3 to 5 tools for kids kids tools kids dress up and pretend play grocery store pretend play for toddlers kids building toys truck toys green toys dump truck truck and trailer toys for boys Features: - FARM TRUCKS DIY TOOL SET - Farm Trucks Create and Play toy set from Kidplokio comes with everything kids need to take care of their very own farming equipment, just like Dad: a truck, a livestock trailer, and tools to remove and replace the truck parts - PRACTICE COORDINATION - DIY pretend play tool sets for kids encourage them to practice hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills; tools included allow kids to tinker with the farm truck parts and learn about how trucks work - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTION - Pretend play sets with DIY tools and parts are a great way for parents to play with their little ones and teach them about the importance of taking care of tools and equipment; Encourages fun and creative playtime with parents and children - DURABLE KIDS' TOYS - All pretend play toys included are made of durable, high-quality plastic; Comes with sturdy plastic storage box with a snap-tight lid and top handle to store toys when not in use; easy clean up after playtime - SPECIFICATIONS - Recommended age: 3 years and up; Material; plastic; Colors: assorted; Storage bin included: yes; Dimensions: 13" x 9" x 8"; Weight: 2.02 pounds === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Farm Trucks Pretend Play Set with DIY Tools

openai.title_differentiation: DIY Farm Truck Tools, Truck And Trailer, Fine Motor Skills, Snap-Tight Storage Box, Hands-On Learning, Ages 3 And Up
